summary: The latest evolution of Eleveight's performance freeride platform with refined aerodynamics and updated construction. Continues to deliver premium performance at a competitive price.

sources.summary: Incremental improvements over the V6 with better turning precision and slightly improved low-end.
Eleveight continues to deliver excellent value. The V9 refines an already great platform.
A worthy update that keeps the RS line competitive with kites costing hundreds more.
